description: Literary work in Judaeo-Arabic. Perhaps al-Faraj baʿd al-Shidda of Rabbenu Nissim. This page discusses Naḥum of Gamzu and Rabbenu ha-Qodesh when he was afflicted by illness (and toothache?). Needs further examination for proper identification.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
